name: Input
description: A single-line text field for user input.

variant.description: Visual variant of the input field.

textAlign.description: Alignment of text within the field.

validationStatus.description: Validation state displayed by status adornment (can also be provided by FormField context).

startAdornment.description: Content rendered at the start of the input.

endAdornment.description: Content rendered at the end of the input.

emptyReadOnlyMarker.description: Marker shown when read-only input has no value.

inputProps.description: Attributes passed to the inner input element.

inputRef.description: Ref for the inner input element.

bordered.description: Renders the input with a full border.

keyboard: Backspace and character keys for text editing
Enter/Space activate interactive adornments when they are focused
aria: Prefer wrapping with FormField to provide visible labels and descriptive text
Do not rely on adornments for labeling; screen readers may not announce static adornments
Use emptyReadOnlyMarker for empty read-only fields to communicate intentional emptiness
